creator: christop@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
miwi@FreeBSD.org schrieb:
> Synopsis: editors/openoffice.org-2 build fails with devel/epm installed
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Sun Jun 1 12:42:52 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> Hi, Could you please test if this issue still exists with an fresh
> portstree? Thanks for your report.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=111561

On a fresh FreeBSD 7.0 installation with a portsnap of June 25th it
still does not work.

Commandline was:
make ALL_LOCALIZED_LANGS=yes LOCALIZED_LANG=all WITH_CCACHE=yes
WITH_KDE=yes WITH_CUPS=yes WITH_TTF_BYTECODE_ENABLED=yes build >>
